_comment: Curated educational videos for instant clip serving. Hand-pick short (3-10 min) high-quality videos per topic. Run `python -m scripts.seed_clips` to process them. Topics with empty videos[] need URLs filled in — see `_search_hint` for what to look for.

convolutional-neural-networks.name: Convolutional Neural Networks
convolutional-neural-networks._search_hint: Try: 'CNN explained' from 3Blue1Brown, deeplizard, or StatQuest. 8-15 min ideal.

recurrent-neural-networks.name: Recurrent Neural Networks
recurrent-neural-networks._search_hint: Try: 'RNN LSTM explained' from StatQuest or Andrej Karpathy.

reinforcement-learning-basics.name: Reinforcement Learning Basics
reinforcement-learning-basics._search_hint: Try: 'reinforcement learning explained' from Two Minute Papers or DeepMind.

embeddings-intuition.name: Vector Embeddings
embeddings-intuition._search_hint: Try: 'word embeddings explained' from CodeEmporium or 3Blue1Brown.

loss-functions.name: Loss Functions
loss-functions._search_hint: Try: 'cross entropy loss' or 'MSE loss' from StatQuest.

large-language-models.name: How LLMs Work
large-language-models._search_hint: Try: 'how GPT works' from 3Blue1Brown or Computerphile.

probability-basics.name: Probability Basics
probability-basics._search_hint: Try: 'probability for beginners' from Khan Academy or 3Blue1Brown.

statistics-fundamentals.name: Statistics Fundamentals
statistics-fundamentals._search_hint: Try: 'statistics for beginners' from StatQuest. 10-15 min playlist starters.

recursion.name: Recursion
recursion._search_hint: Try: 'recursion explained' from Computerphile or HackerRank. 5-10 min.

linked-lists.name: Linked Lists
linked-lists._search_hint: Try: 'linked list data structure' from mycodeschool or HackerRank.

sorting-algorithms.name: Sorting Algorithms
sorting-algorithms._search_hint: Try: 'quicksort vs mergesort visualized' from Computerphile.

heaps-priority-queues.name: Heaps & Priority Queues
heaps-priority-queues._search_hint: Try: 'min heap explained' from HackerRank or mycodeschool.

oop-basics.name: OOP Basics
oop-basics._search_hint: Try: 'object oriented programming explained' from Fireship or CS50.

system-design-basics.name: System Design Basics
system-design-basics._search_hint: Try: 'system design interview' from Gaurav Sen or ByteByteGo. 10-15 min.

http-basics.name: HTTP & The Web
http-basics._search_hint: Try: 'how HTTP works' from Fireship or Computerphile. <10 min.

tcp-ip-explained.name: TCP/IP
tcp-ip-explained._search_hint: Try: 'how the internet works TCP' from Computerphile.

docker-basics.name: Docker Basics
docker-basics._search_hint: Try: 'docker in 100 seconds' from Fireship, then a 10-min deep dive.

oauth-explained.name: OAuth Explained
oauth-explained._search_hint: Try: 'OAuth 2.0 explained' from OktaDev or Fireship.

how-cpus-work.name: How CPUs Work
how-cpus-work._search_hint: Try: 'how a CPU works' from Branch Education or Computerphile. 10-20 min.

memory-management.name: Memory Management
memory-management._search_hint: Try: 'stack vs heap memory' from Computerphile or LowLevelLearning.

evolution-natural-selection.name: Evolution by Natural Selection
evolution-natural-selection._search_hint: Try: 'natural selection explained' from CrashCourse or Kurzgesagt.

photosynthesis.name: Photosynthesis
photosynthesis._search_hint: Try: 'photosynthesis explained' from Khan Academy or CrashCourse Biology.

newtons-laws.name: Newton's Laws of Motion
newtons-laws._search_hint: Try: 'Newton's three laws' from CrashCourse Physics or Khan Academy.

wave-particle-duality.name: Wave–Particle Duality
wave-particle-duality._search_hint: Try: 'double slit experiment' from Veritasium or PBS Space Time.

game-theory-basics.name: Game Theory Basics
game-theory-basics._search_hint: Try: 'prisoner's dilemma' from Veritasium or TED-Ed. 5-10 min.

opportunity-cost.name: Opportunity Cost
opportunity-cost._search_hint: Try: 'opportunity cost explained' from Marginal Revolution U or Khan Academy.
